summary: Freeform text summary of the problems with the inefficiencies or failure modes in the trace: The system got stuck repeatedly reissuing the same Wayback-navigation instructions while WebSurfer kept clicking wrong dates/pages (e.g., March 15/5/6 2025 and Save Page), effectively resetting the workflow and never verifying or extracting the two 2021 menus before ending with “Unable to complete task.”
raw:
A. Freeform text summary of the problems with the inefficiencies or failure modes in the trace: The system got stuck repeatedly reissuing the same Wayback-navigation instructions while WebSurfer kept clicking wrong dates/pages (e.g., March 15/5/6 2025 and Save Page), effectively resetting the workflow and never verifying or extracting the two 2021 menus before ending with “Unable to complete task.”
B. Whether the task is successfully completed or not: no
C. Whether you encounter any of the failure modes or inefficiencies:

1.4 Loss of Conversation History: yes
1.5 Unaware of Termination Conditions: yes

2.2 Fail to Ask for Clarification: no
2.3 Task Derailment: yes
2.4 Information Withholding: no
2.5 Ignored Other Agent's Input: no
2.6 Action-Reasoning Mismatch: yes
3.1 Premature Termination: yes

3.3 No or Incorrect Verification: yes
